## Cases mentioned in passing

### 316 stainless steel heat exchanger tube pitting failure
- **canonical_cluster_id:** "316 stainless steel heat exchanger tube pitting failure"

The 316 stainless steel heat exchanger tube, due to the pitting corrosion. And there's the pitting corrosion that goes on, in the localized chemistry."

### Aluminum 7075 exfoliation corrosion failure
